ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer making the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the transaction occurred */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the transaction */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount for the transaction */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address for shipping */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Description of the target audience for the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign */,
  "campaign_goal" TEXT /* Goal of the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the campaign was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the product belongs */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_products" (
  "customer_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer-product relationship */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who purchased the product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer-product relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer-product relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales channel */,
  "channel_status" TEXT /* Status of the sales channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sales channel was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sales channel was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solicitation_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "do_not_direct_mail" INTEGER /* Preference for direct mail solicitation */,
  "do_not_email" INTEGER /* Preference for email communication */,
  "do_not_telemkt" INTEGER /* Preference for telemarketing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repurchase_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repurchase method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the repurchase method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repurchase method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the repurchase method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the repurchase method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_counts" (
  "count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee count record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the customer's organization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the employee count record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the employee count record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("count_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, transaction) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the customer's access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the customer's access */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the language was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the language was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)
